title: Board Member Compensation and Expenses
description: Board members in Conroe ISD serve without pay, but the district has clear rules about when and how members can be reimbursed for expenses related to their official duties, such as attending conferences or trainings. These guidelines help ensure that any spending of public funds by board members is transparent and accountable. Community members can feel confident that taxpayer dollars are being used appropriately when board members carry out their responsibilities.
